decisions.title: Prioritize Explore V2 Performance vs Feature Completeness
decisions.context: Multiple performance issues surfacing (ENG-10273 channel metadata loading, ENG-10233 flush latency, ENG-10282 data layer investigation) while also building UX improvements (DES-121 family versions, ENG-10293 resizable sidebar). Need to decide whether to freeze features and focus on performance optimization or continue parallel development.

arguments.for: Performance directly impacts 'Decisions Captured Per Customer' north star - slow tools mean fewer decisions. Customer feedback shows latency pain points are primary adoption blocker.
arguments.against: Feature parity gaps vs legacy Explore hurt competitive positioning. Sales team needs family versions and searchable inputs to close deals. Can optimize later once adoption increases.

decisions.title: Commit to Canvas Template Component Architecture
decisions.context: ENG-10073 moves Canvas to template components, ENG-9441 version improvements underway. This represents architectural shift with long-term maintenance implications. Need decision on whether this is the right foundation for 'Build the Moat' pillar or if we should explore alternative approaches.

arguments.for: Template components enable faster customer customization, reduce engineering bottlenecks for standard layouts, align with 'Embed Deeper' strategy by making Canvas more adaptable to customer workflows.
arguments.against: Adds abstraction layer that could limit advanced use cases. May be premature optimization before we fully understand Canvas usage patterns. Resource intensive migration during critical feature development phase.

decisions.title: Accelerate Python Rules Production Readiness
decisions.context: Multiple Rules issues emerging (ENG-10292 comment preservation, ENG-9703 contextual channels overwrite, ENG-10272 bucketing, ENG-10271 live mode disabling) suggesting stability concerns. Python Rules is key 2026 product but quality gates may not be met.
decisions.blockedBy: Need clarity on production rollout criteria and customer pilot feedback from Q1

arguments.for: Python Rules is critical differentiator for 'Build the Moat'. Delaying risks competitive disadvantage. Early adopters willing to work through issues if we're responsive.
arguments.against: Data integrity bugs (contextual channel overwrites, stale cache data) could damage customer trust. Better to delay and ensure quality than rush and create technical debt that haunts us through 2026.

decisions.title: Resource Allocation: FIPS Compliance vs Core Feature Development
decisions.context: ENG-9846 FIPS compliance work (SHA-256 migration) and governance features (DOC-13 DAG, FD-304 automated review) consuming engineering bandwidth. These are 'Embed Deeper' plays for enterprise but don't directly drive north star metric.

arguments.for: Enterprise customers with compliance requirements represent highest LTV. FIPS/governance are table stakes for expansion in regulated industries. Unlocks entire market segments.
arguments.against: Every hour on compliance is hour not spent on Explore V2 performance or Canvas capabilities that drive decisions. Could partner with compliance specialists or delay until H2 2026 when core products are stronger.

decisions.title: Define Ask SIFT Integration Points Across Product Suite
decisions.context: Ask SIFT is 2026 strategic product but no integration work visible in current signals. Need decision on whether it's standalone or embedded in Explore/Canvas/Rules, and when to start integration work.

arguments.for: Embedding Ask SIFT in Explore/Canvas turns every product interaction into potential decision capture. Natural language queries lower barrier to insights. Drives north star directly.
arguments.against: Integration complexity could destabilize core products. Better to perfect standalone Ask SIFT experience first, prove value, then integrate. Risk of diluting focus across too many products simultaneously.

timeAudit.weekSummary: High fragmentation with 22 meetings leaves only 8 hours for deep work. Three 1:1s consuming leadership time while critical decisions (Python Rules readiness, Ask SIFT integration) remain unresolved.
alerts: Zero time allocated to Explore V2 performance review despite multiple escalated tickets
No Ask SIFT product sync scheduled - strategic product has no visible momentum
Canvas architecture decision (ENG-10073) proceeding without formal product review
Four open decisions require resolution by Apr 25 but no decision-making sessions calendared

events.title: Canvas Template Architecture Decision Gate
events.description: Go/no-go on template component migration (ENG-10073). Requires Product, Eng Lead, Design alignment.

events.title: FIPS Compliance Resource Allocation Review
events.description: VP Eng decision on ENG-9846 priority vs core feature work. Include CPO and Finance.

events.title: Explore V2 Performance Sprint Kickoff
events.description: Deadline for prioritization decision. If performance-focused, kickoff dedicated sprint targeting ENG-10273, ENG-10233, ENG-10282.

events.title: Python Rules Production Readiness Review
events.description: Decision on GA timeline based on bug resolution (ENG-10292, ENG-9703, ENG-10272). Include customer pilot feedback.

events.title: Ask SIFT Integration Strategy Due
events.description: CPO delivers decision on standalone vs embedded approach, integration timeline, resource requirements.

events.title: Q2 Strategy Health Check
events.description: Review all three pillars against north star trajectory. Address 'at_risk' status on Nail the Core and Build the Moat.

events.title: Explore V2 Performance Target Achieved
events.description: Target date for <500ms p95 latency if performance sprint approved Apr 22.

events.title: Enterprise Governance Features Complete
events.description: DOC-13 DAG and FD-304 automation delivered. Enables 'Embed Deeper' enterprise expansion.

events.title: Python Rules GA Launch
events.description: Target GA date if Apr 25 decision is positive and bugs resolved by mid-May.

events.title: FIPS Certification Complete
events.description: ENG-9846 SHA-256 migration complete and certified. Unblocks regulated industry deals.

events.title: Ask SIFT Integration Phase 1
events.description: First integration point live (likely Explore if Apr 30 decision favors embedding).

events.title: SmallSat EU Conference
events.description: GTM-113 booth backdrop complete. Showcase Python Rules, Canvas templates, Ask SIFT capabilities.
